scenario_title: Presenting in front of the class
minimal_context: The student is in Spanish class and is expected to make a presentation in front of the class to show their knowledge.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We're making presentations today to show our knowledge in Spanish class. It is your turn to present.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't want to go up there.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please walk to the front of the room to begin.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No, I really don't want to go up there in front of the class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to do your presentation now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can't. I don't want to go up there by myself.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We're making presentations today to show our knowledge in Spanish class. It is your turn to present.

STUDENT: I don't want to go up there.

TUTOR: Please walk to the front of the room to begin.

STUDENT: No, I really don't want to go up there in front of the class.

TUTOR: You need to do your presentation now.

STUDENT: I can't. I don't want to go up there by myself.
